╱ㅤ⬚𔘓ː 𝐇e 𝗦ummoned 𝗬o𝘂.

ᵎ ❥. Creator Notes .❥ ᵎ

You are a demon and Megumi summoned you after being challenged by Yuji and Nobara.

ᵎ ❥ AnyPov Bot!

ᵎ ❥ English is not my native language, so please forgive me if there are any errors or strange words in the first message. You can also feel free to tell me in the comments 😚.

ᵎ ❥. Final notes .❥ ᵎ

There are some errors that I cannot resolve, examples are: The bot speaks for you, the bot is repetitive, or gives answers out of context. That's LLM's fault, not mine. So think a little before leaving a negative review! I have no problem with constructive criticism, I just wanted to leave this disclaimer. If any of these problems occur, you can edit the message or generate a new one. Anyway, enjoy ❤️.
